name: pAntry
hints: The pantry has matches and garlic - both classic vampire-fighting supplies!
GET MATCHES (for lighting torches and cigarettes). GET GARLIC (repels vampires).
GET MATCHES and GET GARLIC. Both are essential anti-vampire items. The garlic protects you at night when the Count roams.
GET MATCHES (light torch/cigarettes), GET GARLIC (vampire protection). Exit via the dumb-waiter. These are key survival items.
notes: Pantry accessible via the dumb-waiter. Contains essential items: sulfur matches (lighting) and garlic (vampire repellent). Both are critical for surviving the night and defeating the Count.
